description: All trainable skills in Leonoria. Skills level by use, with a maximum of 100. Each skill has a title at each tier for flavor and mechanical reference. One use in relevant context = +1 skill level (at lower levels; diminishing as mastery grows).
leveling_note: Skills level faster than aptitudes (~25% per 100 relevant uses). One sword fight = +1 Swordsmanship for that hero. One successful potion brew = +1 Potion Brewing.

categories.description: Sub-traits of Martial Experience. Each weapon type levels independently.

skills.name: Swordsmanship
skills.description: Mastery with all bladed one-handed and two-handed sword types.

level_effects.Novice: Basic attacks land. No special techniques.
level_effects.Seasoned: +5% to hit chance. Parry available.
level_effects.Expert: +10% to hit. Riposte available (counter after successful parry).
level_effects.Master: +15% to hit. Signature Strike: once per battle, ignore Hardening.
level_effects.Legendary Master: +20% to hit. All sword attacks gain +5% crit chance.

skills.name: Archery
skills.description: Mastery with all bow types: longbow, shortbow, recurve bow, greatbow.

level_effects.Novice: Can use bows. Range penalties apply.
level_effects.Seasoned: Range penalty reduced. +5% accuracy.
level_effects.Expert: +10% accuracy. Target weak points (ignore 10% armor).
level_effects.Master: Snap Shot: fire without losing initiative. +15% accuracy.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Misses are rerolled once automatically.

skills.name: Axewielding
skills.description: Mastery with hand axes, great axes, throwing axes.

level_effects.Seasoned: +5% cleave chance (50% damage to adjacent target).
level_effects.Expert: +10% to hit. Cleave improves.
level_effects.Master: Sundering Strike: reduce target Hardening by 5% for 2 turns.
level_effects.Legendary Master: 10% chance to stagger on every hit.

skills.name: Blunt Force
skills.description: Mastery with maces, war hammers, clubs, mauls, and morning stars.

level_effects.Seasoned: +5% stagger chance on hits.
level_effects.Expert: +10% damage against skeletal and construct enemies.
level_effects.Master: Shatter: on crit, reduce target Physiology by 3 temporarily.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Stagger chance 20%. Staggered enemies lose a turn.

skills.name: Small Arms
skills.description: Mastery with knives, daggers, stilettos, throwing blades, and shurikens.

level_effects.Novice: Basic strikes. Can throw daggers at short range.
level_effects.Seasoned: +5% to hit. Backstab available.
level_effects.Expert: Vital Strike: bypass 20% Hardening from stealth.
level_effects.Master: Quick Draw: use Small Arms without spending initiative.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Attacks from Stealth 50+ always hit critical zones.

skills.name: Polearms
skills.description: Mastery with spears, pikes, halberds, glaives, scythes, and tridents.

level_effects.Seasoned: Attack from 2 hex range without penalty.
level_effects.Expert: Wall of Steel: block and counter simultaneously.
level_effects.Master: Sweep: hit all adjacent enemies in one arc.
level_effects.Legendary Master: All polearm attacks threaten a 2-hex area.

skills.name: Shield Fighting
skills.description: Using any shield as both defensive and offensive tool.

level_effects.Seasoned: Shield Bash available (stagger attempt).
level_effects.Expert: +10% Hardening. Redirect 15% incoming damage.
level_effects.Master: Fortress: -15% physical damage when not moving.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Shield bashes deal full weapon damage.

skills.name: Crossbow
skills.description: Mastery with heavy crossbows and hand crossbows.

level_effects.Seasoned: Reload time reduced by 1 turn.
level_effects.Expert: +10% penetration vs armor.
level_effects.Master: Power Shot: guaranteed hit at +25% damage once per battle.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Reload no longer costs a turn.

skills.name: Blowgun & Sling
skills.description: Mastery with blowguns, slings, and bolas. Silent ranged options.

level_effects.Novice: Effective at close-medium range. Very quiet.
level_effects.Seasoned: +5% accuracy. Blowgun darts can carry poison.
level_effects.Expert: Bola Strike: target immobilized 1 turn on hit.
level_effects.Master: Attacks from this skill never reveal the shooter.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Any projectile can carry an alchemical compound without penalty.

skills.name: Thievery
skills.description: Pickpocketing, shoplifting, sleight of hand, and misdirection.

level_effects.Novice: Simple pickpocketing with high detection risk.
level_effects.Seasoned: Detection risk halved.
level_effects.Expert: Complex thefts (documents, keys, worn items).
level_effects.Master: Coordinate team-based theft operations.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Never detected by standard security; only magical detection applies.

skills.name: Stealth
skills.description: Moving without being seen or heard in all environments.

level_effects.Seasoned: Move at full speed without stealth penalty.
level_effects.Expert: Remain hidden while performing simple actions.
level_effects.Master: Shadow Step: teleport to any nearby shadow once per encounter.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Effectively invisible at rest; magical detection requires contested check.

skills.name: Lockpicking
skills.description: Opening locks and disarming simple traps.

level_effects.Seasoned: Standard locks. Simple trap detection.
level_effects.Expert: Complex locks. Improvise picks from materials.
level_effects.Master: Any non-magical lock openable.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Pick any lock in complete darkness by sound alone.

skills.name: Arcane Theory
skills.description: Understanding of Materium mechanics, magical history, and spell construction.

level_effects.Seasoned: Identify rare effects. Predict elemental synergies.
level_effects.Expert: Deduce a creature's Materium school from observation.
level_effects.Master: Teach Materium theory to other heroes.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Counter-Theory — predict and partially counter spells before they resolve.

skills.name: Herbalism
skills.description: Knowledge of plants, fungi, and organic compounds — medicinal and toxic.

level_effects.Novice: Identify common plants. Brew basic teas.
level_effects.Seasoned: Create effective poultices. Identify dangerous fungi.
level_effects.Expert: Identify rare alchemical components in the wild.
level_effects.Master: Synthesize unique compounds.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Identify and use any plant encountered, including Forgotten Kingdom flora.

skills.name: Alchemy
skills.description: Transforming materials into potions, poisons, reagents, and enhancement compounds.

level_effects.Novice: Basic health potions and simple poisons.
level_effects.Seasoned: Resistance potions, sleep compounds, antidotes.
level_effects.Expert: Complex Materium boosters and Physiology enhancers.
level_effects.Master: Create permanent single-use enhancement items.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Transmutation — alter the base properties of materials.

skills.name: Monster Lore
skills.description: Knowledge of creature types, behaviours, and vulnerabilities.

level_effects.Novice: Identify common creatures and basic weaknesses.
level_effects.Seasoned: +5% Perception for known creature categories.
level_effects.Expert: +10% Perception. Know secondary weaknesses and attack patterns.
level_effects.Master: Predict creature behaviour before combat.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Any new creature fully identified after one round of observation.

skills.name: Survival
skills.description: Finding shelter, food, and water in hostile environments.

level_effects.Novice: Survive short exposure in hostile biomes.
level_effects.Seasoned: Climate damage from Hot, Cold, Humidity reduced 15%.
level_effects.Expert: Identify safe routes and shelter automatically.
level_effects.Master: Keep full team alive indefinitely in any biome.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Hostile biomes provide no penalties. World map movement costs reduced.

skills.name: Navigation
skills.description: Reading the land, stars, and maps to find destinations efficiently.

level_effects.Seasoned: Navigation errors reduced 50%.
level_effects.Expert: Always find the most efficient route.
level_effects.Master: Navigate Dark Forests and Forgotten Kingdom without penalty.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Reveal hidden paths on world map.

skills.name: Tracking
skills.description: Following creatures, people, or events through terrain.

level_effects.Novice: Follow fresh tracks in soft ground.
level_effects.Seasoned: Track in all weather. Identify creature type from signs.
level_effects.Expert: Track multiple targets simultaneously.
level_effects.Master: Read an area — understand everything that happened in the last 24 hours.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Follow a target across any surface, including stone and water.

skills.name: Animal Handling
skills.description: Working with, calming, and communicating with animals.

level_effects.Seasoned: Work with wild animals without triggering aggression.
level_effects.Expert: Semi-tame wild creatures. Keep a beast companion.
level_effects.Master: Fully tame any non-magical creature.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Communicate intent with any living creature including magical ones.

skills.name: Persuasion
skills.description: Convincing others through reason, appeal, and social leverage.

level_effects.Novice: Shift neutral NPCs one step toward helpful.
level_effects.Seasoned: Negotiate favorable terms in trade and quests.
level_effects.Expert: Convince hostile NPCs to pause without a fight.
level_effects.Master: Turn enemies into reluctant allies for a scene.
level_effects.Legendary Master: No NPC is truly beyond persuasion.

skills.name: Intimidation
skills.description: Projecting menace to force compliance. Low Openness amplifies this.

level_effects.Seasoned: Reduce NPC Conviction by 5 per success.
level_effects.Expert: Intimidate a group of up to 3 NPCs simultaneously.
level_effects.Master: Break Conviction of enemies below 40 in one roll.
level_effects.Legendary Master: NPCs flee before combat on a successful check.

skills.name: Deception
skills.description: Lying, misdirection, disguise, and creating false impressions.

level_effects.Seasoned: Maintain a cover identity across a short scene.
level_effects.Expert: Long-term false identity across a region.
level_effects.Master: Deceive even perceptive characters.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Establish a completely false reputation in a settlement once per visit.

skills.name: Leadership
skills.description: Directing and inspiring a team under pressure.

level_effects.Novice: Team acts without penalty under stress.
level_effects.Seasoned: One reroll per battle for any team member.
level_effects.Expert: +5% Conviction to all team members when leader above 50% Vitality.
level_effects.Master: Rally: restore all team Metabolism after a round once per battle.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Inspire Greatness: team weapon affinities treated as Expert for one battle per day.

skills.name: Weaponsmithing
skills.description: Forging, repairing, and enhancing weapons.

level_effects.Novice: Repair damaged weapons. Craft basic tools.
level_effects.Seasoned: Craft functional weapons of any basic type.
level_effects.Expert: Craft quality weapons with minor bonuses.
level_effects.Master: Craft masterwork weapons with significant bonuses.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Weapons created can accept magical enchanting.

skills.name: Armorsmithing
skills.description: Crafting, repairing, and improving armor and shields.

level_effects.Seasoned: Craft functional armor of any type.
level_effects.Expert: Custom fit: +5% Hardening bonus to crafted armor.
level_effects.Master: Masterwork armor with significant bonuses.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Armor created can accept magical enchanting.

skills.name: Potion Brewing
skills.description: Creating potions, tinctures, and alchemical compounds.

level_effects.Seasoned: Resistance potions (10% resistance to one damage type, 3 turns).
level_effects.Expert: Materium potions (restore 20% pool). Poison compounds.
level_effects.Master: Enhancement brews (temporary aptitude boosts).
level_effects.Legendary Master: Permanent enhancement potions (raise one stat by 2 permanently, single use).

skills.name: Enchanting
skills.description: Imbuing items with permanent magical properties. Rare. Requires Erudition 50+ and Ingenuity 40+.

level_effects.Novice: Add a temporary one-battle glow to a weapon.
level_effects.Seasoned: Add minor permanent property to a rune-ready item.
level_effects.Expert: Add moderate permanent property.
level_effects.Master: Create properly magical items with meaningful bonuses.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Artifact Creation — items approach legendary status.

skills.name: Athletics
skills.description: Running, climbing, jumping, and physical endurance.

level_effects.Seasoned: -10% Metabolism drain from running and climbing.
level_effects.Expert: Carry a downed ally without Metabolism penalty.
level_effects.Master: Forced march without Metabolism loss for one world-map day.
level_effects.Legendary Master: All Physiology sub-trait rolls gain +10%.

skills.name: Acrobatics
skills.description: Balance, tumbling, and precision movement.

level_effects.Seasoned: No movement penalty in difficult terrain.
level_effects.Expert: Tumble: avoid one attack per round with a roll.
level_effects.Master: Parkour — move through obstacles others cannot.
level_effects.Legendary Master: Agilities rolls gain +10% permanently.

skills.name: Lightwielding
skills.description: Practical application of Lightwielding school spells (Purelight, Solacium, etc.).
skills.prerequisite: Materium Affinity 20+ and Lightwielding school access

level_effects.Seasoned: Solacium available. Purelight cost -5%.
level_effects.Expert: Aegis Reflection available. All Lightwielding costs -10%.
level_effects.Master: Verdicium available. Sustained Purelight aura (3 turns).
level_effects.Legendary Master: Blessed Materium access. All Lightwielding +15% damage.

skills.name: Materium Channeling
skills.description: Practical application of the Focused Triad (Impact, Earthen, Tempest, Fire, Aquas, Athropium, Temporal).

level_effects.Seasoned: First elemental school available. Synergies available.
level_effects.Expert: Second elemental school. Synergy bonus increases.
level_effects.Master: Dual-element casting. Pool cost -15%.
level_effects.Legendary Master: All Materium damage +20%. All synergies trigger at double bonus.

skills.name: Shadow Weaving
skills.description: Practical application of the Malevolent Triad (Darkvoid, Chill, Darkblood, Arcane, Darkmind).

level_effects.Novice: Basic Darkvoid bolt (high variance). 15% pool cost.
level_effects.Seasoned: Chill available. Variance reduced 50%.
level_effects.Expert: Darkblood available (backlash applies). Pool cost -10%.
level_effects.Master: Darkmind available. Suppress Darkvoid variance entirely.
level_effects.Legendary Master: All Shadow Arts +20%. Darkblood backlash reduced to 5%.
